response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, TX, generated a total revenue of $54.4 million for the year, with quarterly figures of $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and $16.2 million in Q4, reflecting an 18 % year‑over‑year growth. The company currently employs 342 people.
